data.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): Add test case test_check_cycle_at_level_skips_none_type — Given a synthetic tracker where a ticket in the BFS path has ticket_type=None (corrupt/error state), When check_cycle_at_level is called, Then it returns False without raising AttributeError (graceful skip). Update .test-index with [test_check_cycle_at_level_skips_none_type] RED marker.
